acceptance_criteria.given: pretool-bash-safety.sh is the active PreToolUse hook
acceptance_criteria.when: a Bash command is 'python3 /root/.claude/scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py' (absolute path, bare, no compound structure)
acceptance_criteria.then: the hook exits 2 and stderr contains the token 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write'

acceptance_criteria.given: pretool-bash-safety.sh is the active PreToolUse hook
acceptance_criteria.when: a Bash command is "python3 -c 'import subprocess; subprocess.run([\"python3\", \"scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py\"])'" (python3 -c with literal script name in command text)
acceptance_criteria.then: the hook exits 2 and stderr contains the token 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write'

acceptance_criteria.given: pretool-bash-safety.sh is the active PreToolUse hook
acceptance_criteria.when: a Bash command is 'python3 scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py' (relative path, bare, no compound structure, no /tmp/ path literal)
acceptance_criteria.then: the hook exits 0 (bare-writer allowlist passes — regression guard)

acceptance_criteria.given: agents/changelog-analyst.md at the DO NOT section
acceptance_criteria.then: the DO NOT list contains an item explicitly forbidding auto-bulk: commit message prefix when BULK=false, with text 'Never use auto-bulk: commit message prefix when BULK=false'

check.expected: match found in DO NOT section

acceptance_criteria.given: agents/changelog-analyst.md at the DO NOT section
acceptance_criteria.then: the DO NOT list contains an item explicitly forbidding direct invocation of write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py by any path form

check.expected: match found in DO NOT section

acceptance_criteria.when: a git commit command with message matching 'auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for ...' is evaluated and no valid /tmp/claude-bulk-commit-sentinel-*.json exists
acceptance_criteria.then: the guard exits 2 with 'BLOCKED: auto-bulk commit requires a bulk-commit sentinel' (regression guard for primary fix)

check.description: existing test verifying sentinel check behavior
